data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding the service menu displayed on Google.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the service menu being displayed on Google, which is a specific need outlined in the linked use case. However, the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations regarding the display of the service menu on Google, indicating a lack of necessary information to assess this requirement. As such, the validation is blocked due to insufficient evidence to assert a definitive conclusion.
gaps: No evidence of the service menu being displayed on Google.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the display of the service menu on Google.
